subject: [PATCH v6 1/2] mm: track DONTCACHE dirty pages per bdi_writeback

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch adds a new counter to track the number of dirty pages with the dropbehind flag set, which are written via RWF_DONTCACHE. The counter is used by the writeback flusher to determine how many pages to write back when expediting writeback for IOCB_DONTCACHE writes. This allows for more efficient handling of these types of writes without flushing the entire BDI's dirty pages. The patch introduces a new enum value WB_DONTCACHE_DIRTY and updates several functions in mm/filemap.c and mm/page-writeback.c to increment or decrement this counter as necessary.
